executive_summary: Build workflow execution failed due to GitHub Actions workflow file not found (HTTP 404). The workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404 error, indicating the .github/workflows/build.yml file is either missing, inaccessible, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository. This is a critical configuration error preventing any build execution.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found error when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates the workflow file does not exist at the expected path or is not accessible.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository at the specified branch (main), or GitHub Actions is disabled/not configured for this repository. The GitHub API returned 404 indicating the resource cannot be found.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or the configuration issue is resolved. This blocks all CI/CD automation and prevents code validation, testing, and deployment.

errors.title: Missing GitHub Actions Workflow Configuration
errors.description: The repository lacks the required GitHub Actions workflow configuration file that defines the build process. Without this file, automated builds cannot be triggered.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure
errors.root_cause: The .github/workflows directory may not exist, or the build.yml file has not been created in this repository. This is a prerequisite for GitHub Actions automation.
errors.impact: Prevents automated CI/CD pipeline execution. Manual intervention required to create and configure the workflow file before any builds can proceed.

errors.title: GitHub Actions API Authentication or Permissions Issue
errors.description: The 404 error could also indicate insufficient permissions on the GitHub token being used to dispatch workflows, or GitHub Actions may be disabled for this repository.
errors.error_message: Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled
errors.root_cause: The GitHub personal access token may lack the required 'workflow' or 'actions' scopes, or the repository settings may have GitHub Actions disabled.
errors.impact: Even if the workflow file exists, builds cannot be triggered without proper API permissions. This requires token regeneration with correct scopes or enabling GitHub Actions in repository settings.

recommended_actions.description: Create .github/workflows/build.yml file in the repository with proper Maven build configuration
Check repository settings to ensure GitHub Actions is enabled and not restricted
Ensure the GitHub personal access token has 'workflow' and 'actions' scopes enabled
Ensure the .github/workflows directory exists in the repository root

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Build failure detected at attempt 3. No Maven build logs available due to workflow configuration failure. Error classification performed based on GitHub API response.
compliance_notes.approval_reason: Workflow file creation requires repository write access and architectural review
